Caption: Bode modulus and phase angle plots of a control coating (MgO and TiO2), and a coating pigmented with lithium salt. The measurement area is 7.1 cm2.
Bode modulus and phase angle plots of the lithium oxalate salt filled coating during salt spray exposure (ASTM B117). The measurement area is 7.1 cm2.
Bode modulus and phase angle plots of a lithium oxalate salt filled coating during constant immersion in 3.5% NaCl. The measurement area is 7.1 cm2.

Morphology and elemental analysis with field-emmision scanning electron microsope (FESEM) a.) before B117 exposure; b.) afer B117 exposure; c.) elemental linescan location; d.) elemental disribution along the linescan.

Localized anodic and cathodic sites mapped by scanning vibrating electrode techniques (SVET). Plots on top are first mappings at 0 hour, in middle are the 12 hours, and at bottom are the 24 hours mappings. Left side (a-c) is with 0.1% NaCl solution and right side (d-f) with 0.1% NaCl and 0.1% Li2CO3.

Localized anodic and cathodic sites mapped by SVET of an epoxy pigmented with lithium salts. Plots on top are initial mappings, in middle are the 2 hours’, and at bottom are the 4 hours mappings. Left side is the intact coating (a-c) in 0.1% NaCl solution and right side (d-f) the same coating with a 0.5mm defect in 0.1% NaCl.
